- Fixed: `mngr push --uncommitted-changes=merge` no longer fails with `git stash pop failed: untracked working tree file would be overwritten by stash pop` when the rsync target is an untracked or gitignored directory on the destination that already contains files. MERGE mode now stashes only tracked-file changes (omitting `git stash -u`), so an rsync that writes into an untracked directory cannot collide with the post-pop restore. STASH mode is unchanged and still includes untracked files (the user explicitly asked to set the workspace aside).
